trending_videos.title: SPIDER-MAN: BRAND NEW DAY – New Trailer (4K)
trending_videos.description:
The world may have forgotten Peter Parker, but he hasn't forgotten them. 

Watch the new trailer for #SpiderManBrandNewDay, in theatres July 31. Tickets on sale NOW.

July 31, 2026

It's a BRAND NEW DAY for Peter Parker. Fighting crime full-time as Spider-Man in a world that doesn’t remember him—and the pressure of seeing his old friends move on without him—sparks a change in Peter he may not have the power to control. But that transformation might also be the only thing that can stop a shocking new threat to the city and those he loves - a powerful villain no one can even see.
The world may have forgotten Peter Parker, but he hasn’t forgotten them.

Directed by:   
Destin Daniel Cretton   
 
Written by: 
Chris McKenna & Erik Sommers and Justin Kuritzkes
   
Based on the MARVEL Comic Book by: 
Stan Lee and Steve Ditko

Produced by:      
Kevin Feige, p.g.a.
Amy Pascal, p.g.a.   
Avi Arad
Rachel O'Connor, p.g.a.

Executive Producers:    
Louis D'Esposito 
David Cain

Cast:  
Tom Holland

international_appeal.description: The inclusion of non-English content such as the Chainsaw Man trailer indicates a strong trend towards international content gaining popularity on YouTube.
international_appeal.actionable_insight: Consider creating or promoting content that has cross-cultural appeal or includes multilingual subtitles to reach a global audience.

franchise_and_sequels.description: Several videos are related to existing franchises (Chainsaw Man, Spider-Man, Avengers, Raising Kanan), indicating strong viewer interest in familiar brands.
franchise_and_sequels.actionable_insight: Capitalize on existing fan bases by creating content tied to popular franchises or by exploring sequel possibilities in your content strategy.

DIY_and_experiential_content.description: Videos such as 'If You Build It, I'll Buy It!' show interest in DIY and experiential content where the process is as engaging as the result.
DIY_and_experiential_content.actionable_insight: Develop content that involves interactive experiences or showcases creative processes to engage viewers.

gaming_and_simulation.description: Gaming content remains strong, with titles like 'Meccha Chameleon' and 'Zenless Zone Zero', indicating continued interest in gaming and simulation genres.
gaming_and_simulation.actionable_insight: Invest in gaming content production or partnerships, especially with emerging games or unique simulation experiences.

multi-genre engagement.description: Top channels are involved in diverse genres, from anime (MAPPA CHANNEL) to gaming (MrBeast Gaming) and movies (Sony Pictures Entertainment).
multi-genre engagement.actionable_insight: Encourage multi-genre content creation to tap into different audience segments and enhance channel versatility.

single-video dominance.description: Each top channel only has a single video in the trending list, suggesting that quality over quantity can drive significant viewership.
single-video dominance.actionable_insight: Focus on optimizing the quality and appeal of each video rather than sheer volume to improve chances of trending.

cross-promotion strategies.description: Collaborations between top channels and content creators can leverage diverse audiences.
cross-promotion strategies.actionable_insight: Explore cross-promotion opportunities with creators from different genres to expand reach and share audiences.

localized content.description: The presence of non-English content highlights the opportunity for localized content production.
localized content.actionable_insight: Invest in creating content tailored to specific regions or languages to attract local viewers and build regional influence.

emerging technology and themes.description: The interest in simulation games and high-tech themes like 'Zenless Zone Zero' highlights a market for tech-driven narratives.
emerging technology and themes.actionable_insight: Explore incorporating emerging technologies and futuristic themes into content development to align with viewer interests.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
